inputs.label: Surface Area
inputs.businessContext: Total surface area of concrete to be sealed

businessContext_i18n.en: Total surface area of concrete to be sealed
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sızdırmazlık yapılacak toplam beton yüzey alanı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface totale du béton à sceller
businessContext_i18n.es: Área total de superficie de concreto a sellar

inputs.label: Coverage Rate
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturer's stated coverage rate per coat

businessContext_i18n.en: Manufacturer's stated coverage rate per coat
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üreticinin kat başına belirttiği kaplama oranı
businessContext_i18n.de: Vom Hersteller angegebene Ergiebigkeit pro Anstrich
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de couverture déclaré par le fabricant par couche
businessContext_i18n.es: Rendimiento declarado por el fabricante por capa

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Extra material to account for spillage, overspray, and uneven application

businessContext_i18n.en: Extra material to account for spillage, overspray, and uneven application
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dökülme, aşırı püskürtme ve düzensiz uygulama için ekstra malzeme
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliches Material für Verschütten, Spritzer und ungleichmäßigen Auftrag
businessContext_i18n.fr: Matériau supplémentaire pour tenir compte des déversements, des surprojections et de l'application inégale
businessContext_i18n.es: Material extra para derrames, sobrepulverización y aplicación desigual

inputs.label: Porosity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for coverage based on concrete surface roughness (1.0 for smooth, 1.2 for medium, 1.5 for rough)

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for coverage based on concrete surface roughness (1.0 for smooth, 1.2 for medium, 1.5 for rough)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beton yüzey pürüzlülüğüne göre kaplama çarpanı (düz için 1.0, orta için 1.2, pürüzlü için 1.5)
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für die Ergiebigkeit basierend auf der Betonoberflächenrauheit (1,0 für glatt, 1,2 für mittel, 1,5 für rau)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur de couverture basé sur la rugosité de la surface du béton (1.0 pour lisse, 1.2 pour moyen, 1.5 pour rugueux)
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador de rendimiento según rugosidad de la superficie de concreto (1.0 para lisa, 1.2 para media, 1.5 para rugosa)

inputs.label: Price per Gallon
inputs.businessContext: Cost of one gallon of sealer

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of one gallon of sealer
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de un galón de sellador

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
